title: Cobblemon Wipeout (by Dimy)
body:
# Introduction
Hey wassup guys! Welcome to Cobblemon Wipeout, the ultimate Cobblemon Hardcore challenge!

You might recognize this modpack from a video I made!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/kRN9hZjCpTQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Description
Cobblemon Wipeout is a brutal roguelite twist on the classic Cobblemon experience. Built for players who want more challenge, more chaos, and way less mercy!

This modpack is filled with aggressive wild Pokémon, hardcore trainer battles, permadeath mechanics, and roguelike item drops, every step outside your base is a risk.

Cobblemon Wipeout will throw every challenge your way like dodging alpha pokémon ambushes, surviving double battles with limited captures and a level cap and much more!

Cobblemon Hardcore is designed to push your skills and your sanity to the limit!

# Features
- Whiteout Addon: Die instantly when all your Pokémon faint
- Difficulty Lock: No changing difficulties, you're stuck on Hardcore mode!
- Fight or Flight Addon: Wild Pokémon are aggressive and hunt you down
- Alpha Pokémon: Alpha pokémon spawn in your world, and they're always aggresive!
- RCT Trainers + Trainer Doubles: Trainers spawn everywhere + every battle is now a double battle! Can you become the champion?
- Capture Cap Addon: Limits how many Pokémon you can catch per trainer level!
- Cobblemon Fight First: Must battle and weaken a pokémon before trying to catch them!
- Cobblerogue Addon: This is just absolute hell, Enjoy!
